currentSprintFocus: Sprint 11 (Analytics & Rapports, M11) — BOTH halves now built and committed this session: analytics dashboard (f3547d4) + rapports layer (f27d58f: PDF/Excel generation, monthly cron, on-demand, CSV/Excel export, demo data seeder). docs/TASKS.md Sprint 11 header still not updated to reflect completion — still shows ⬜ À FAIRE despite the work being functionally done.
status: Sprints 1–5 + 8 + 9 + 10 COMPLETE ✅ (7a1de70, 47ef8b8, 6aaa354). Server refactor pass COMPLETE ✅ (dd2809d). Sprint 11 functionally complete and committed (f3547d4, f27d58f) — not yet manually verified, docs/TASKS.md header not updated. Sprints 9/10 also still awaiting manual end-to-end verification.

activeSession.task: Sprint 11 — Module Analytics & Rapports (M11), rapports half, committed f27d58f (second part of the day, analytics half already committed f3547d4): new `modules/report/` — `rapports.service.ts` generates combined multi-module PDF (page-break per module, reuses Sprint 10's `genererPDFDepuisHTML`) or multi-sheet Excel, archives the file as a `documents` row (new `rapport` category) + a `rapports` history row (new table: type mensuel/a_la_demande, période, modules inclus, format, documentId, genereParUserId nullable=cron). Monthly cron `jobs/rapport-mensuel.ts` (1st of month 06:00) generates the previous month's report in both formats; also registered as a manually-triggerable `registre.ts` job (`rapport_mensuel`) — this closes the Sprint 10 backlog item of the same name. Separately, `analytics.export.service.ts` (new) + `analytics.controller.ts`'s `exporterAnalytics` add a single-module live CSV/Excel export (`GET /api/analytics/export`), distinct from the archived multi-module rapport. Client: `AnalyticsPage.tsx` gained a 9th 'Rapports' tab (on-demand generation form + history table) and Excel/CSV export buttons on every other tab. New `packages/server/src/db/seed-demo.ts` (446 lines, filled in from the empty stub committed last session) — NODE_ENV-guarded demo-data generator spreading realistic data across 12 months so the new Analytics dashboards aren't empty, plus a 14-day backfill of `courriersCriticiteSnapshots` since the real cron only started today. `db:seed-demo` npm script moved from the root package.json (wrong place, added by mistake last session) to `packages/server/package.json` (correct workspace). docs/TASKS.md: Sprint 10 flipped to ✅ COMPLÉTÉ, its 'Job manuel rapport mensuel' item marked done — but Sprint 11's own header was NOT updated (still ⬜ À FAIRE) despite both halves now being done. Known dead code: `modules/report/routes/rapports.route.ts` was created empty (0 bytes) and never wired up — the actual routes live in `analytics.route.ts` instead; this stub file should be deleted. See `sessions/2026-07-04.md` (second section) for full file-by-file detail.
activeSession.nextAction: Delete or wire up the dead `modules/report/routes/rapports.route.ts` empty stub. Run `tsc --noEmit` both packages. Manually generate an on-demand report (PDF and Excel) from the new Rapports tab and confirm the archived document opens. Run `npm run db:seed-demo` against a dev DB and confirm Analytics tabs render non-empty charts. Manually trigger the `rapport_mensuel` job from AdminParametresPage. Update docs/TASKS.md Sprint 11 header to ✅. Still open from Sprint 9: fix `/portail` → `/portal` href bug in DocumentsPage.tsx. Still open from Sprint 10: manual verification of parameter-driven OTP/lockout/backup-retention/deepl behaviors.

criticalRules: NEVER run shadcn CLI — Tailwind v4 incompatibility
NEVER put transition inside framer-motion Variants objects
NEVER use CORS origin wildcard with credentials: true
ALWAYS use @/ path alias for client imports
ALWAYS use ANAC design tokens (bg-anac-navy), never raw hex
